name: wolastoq-bingo
description: Saint Mary's Entertainment Centre - Bingo Ticket Booking System

scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm test && npm run audit:prod
scripts.audit:prod: cd client && npm audit --omit=dev && cd ../server && npm audit --omit=dev
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run test:holds && npm run test:api
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run migrate && npm run seed
